@patdx/pkg

Install binary packages on Linux and macOS from this catalog or any URL. Default remote: https://repo.pmil.me

Example install:

deno run -A --reload jsr:@patdx/pkg add apktool

Packages

  • apktool
  • caddy
  • codexbar
  • duckdb
  • git-credential-manager
  • windsurf
repo.json jsr:@patdx/pkg
